issues.description: Effect is incomplete. DSL only captures the Rest action but omits the entire conditional chain: opponent's choice to return DON!! cards, and the power reduction if they decline. The trigger should also be OnAttack (opponent's attack), not OnAttacked (being attacked).
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacking), not 'OnAttacked' (this card being attacked).

Missing conditional logic: (1) Rest is optional ('You may'), (2) opponent gets choice to return DON!!, (3) if they don't, apply −2000 power to up to 1 opponent Leader/Character. Current DSL only includes Rest with no conditions or follow-up effects.
Duration missing: 'during this turn' indicates the power reduction should have duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not Permanent.
